purpose: Targeted local probe for the rebuilt RQ3 graph channel. Focus on cases where v4 showed graph regressions or no graph gain under high noise.

cases.eligibility_note: No-ref OpenStack case used to verify that graph suppression no longer drifts the agent back toward sync-power-state actions.
